ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "year_level" INTEGER /* Year level of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission to the university */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the major */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "maximum_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "core_courses" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the core course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Semester 1, Semester 2, Summer) */,
  "required_credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits required for the core course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id", "course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electives" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the elective course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Semester 1, Semester 2) */,
  "required_credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits required for the elective course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id", "course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Semester 1, Semester 2) */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year in which the course is offered */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degree_requirements" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Description of the degree requirement */,
  "required_credits" INTEGER /* Total number of credits required for the degree */,
  "required_courses" TEXT /* Specific courses required for the degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id", "requirement")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_major" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "concentration" TEXT /* Concentration within the major */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_major_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., advisor, faculty member, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "user_role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)
